{{CargoRelic
|name=Rice Cooker
|class_id=20541
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The electric rice cooker, also known as an electric pot, was not invented by a company involved in scientific research or kitchenware development. Instead, it was created by a telecommunications company. They developed this highly convenient electric rice cooker to help their employees reduce cooking time and have more time for work.
|fame=14
|art=16
|fth=14
|civ=33
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail RUSH +2<br>New Dishes Created: 480/480
|ss2=Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail RUSH +3<br>New Dishes Created: 480/480
|ss3=Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail RUSH +4<br>New Dishes Created: 480/480
|ss4=Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail RUSH +4<br>New Dishes Created: 480/480
|ss7=Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail RUSH +4<br>New Dishes Created: 480/480<br> (Awakened)
}}
